message:
fix(engine): correctness fixes across 20 modules — boundary conditions, type safety, and semantic bugs

Targeted fixes addressing logic errors discovered during integration testing:

activation_lifecycle: fix rollout phase transition — remove incorrect
  guard against Default phase; finalize from current phase on exhaustion

adversarial_campaign: add mid-range amplification tier for evasion scores;
  fix novel technique bonus to properly saturate; use dedicated policy
  regression error code; allow threshold adjustment in both directions;
  reject fully-undetected attack results; fix tie-break to prefer higher
  dimension; fix statistical significance to use <= for rate comparison

anti_entropy: restrict fallback rate calculation to actual window slice

attested_execution_cell: fix typo in schema constant ("AttstedExecutionCell"
  -> "AttestedExecutionCell")

cancellation_lifecycle: fix success flag — timeout escalation now correctly
  yields failure (was OR, should be AND-NOT)

conformance_harness: remove broken minimization loop that never re-evaluated
  candidates; replace with no-op + comment documenting the limitation

demotion_rollback: include zone in receipt canonical preimage; fix
  divergence threshold from > to >= (off-by-one)

feature_parity_tracker: reorder error codes to sequential assignment
  (WaiverNotFound=0002 through GateEvaluationFailed=0008)

frankentui_adapter: fix refresh floor enforcement — .min() -> .max() to
  enforce minimum refresh intervals, not maximum

hostcall_telemetry: make snapshot record_id Option<u64> to distinguish
  empty recorder from first-record state; fix denial_rate_millionths
  return type from i64 to u64 with saturating arithmetic

idempotency_key: scope TTL eviction to the target computation only,
  preventing cross-computation entry deletion

migration_compatibility: use first phase record timestamp as declared_at
  instead of current tick; clone phase_records to avoid move

migration_contract: VerificationFailed is no longer terminal — allows
  rollback recovery from verification failures

portfolio_governor: deduplicate completed obligation IDs before computing
  friction rate to avoid double-counting

proof_specialization_linkage: tighten proof validity to exact epoch match
  (was <=, now ==) — proofs from earlier epochs are no longer accepted

revocation_freshness: Fresh->Stale on any gap (was only >threshold);
  Recovering state now denies operations (was allowing them)

safe_mode_fallback: emit Recovering status event before Normal in recovery
  sequence; fix StaleData mapping to EvidenceExpired (was EvidenceUnavailable)

session_hostcall_channel: fix session expiry to trigger at exact deadline
  (>= instead of >); fix replay drop threshold to trigger on exceeding
  threshold (> instead of >=)

trust_card: add missing degradation tracking for transitions within
  non-degraded tiers (downward) and within degraded tiers (both directions)

franken-extension-host: fix termination deadline check (< instead of <=);
  fix escrow trace_ref (was duplicating policy_id)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
